mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resignation_application (employee_id, resignation_type, resignation_reason, resignation_date, handover_info, handover_to, status, submitter_id) VALUES (#{employeeId}, #{resignationType}, #{resignationReason}, #{resignationDate}, #{handoverInfo}, #{handoverTo}, #{status}, #{submitterId})
mapper.select: SELECT ra.*, e.name AS employee_name, e.dept_id, d.dept_name, ht.name AS handover_to_name, su.username AS submitter_name FROM resignation_application ra JOIN employee e ON ra.employee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN department d ON e.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN employee ht ON ra.handover_to = ht.id LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON ra.submitter_id = su.id WHERE ra.id = #{id}
